impact_matrix.impact: Protocol insolvency, excluding proposer/challenger bonds or fee vaults.
impact_matrix.local_next_step: Map exact contract/client component and expected invariant; no execution.

impact_matrix.impact: Loss of user funds by direct theft, excluding proposer/challenger bonds or fee vaults.
impact_matrix.local_next_step: Create invariant inventory for bridge/portal/message assets; no transaction replay.

impact_matrix.impact: Direct loss or permanent freezing of funds, excluding proposer/challenger bonds or fee vaults.
impact_matrix.local_next_step: Static review only until a local fork or official integration-test proof plan is approved.

impact_matrix.impact: Execute arbitrary system commands or retrieve sensitive running-server data/files.
impact_matrix.local_next_step: Rules-only mapping; no probing web properties.

impact_matrix.impact: Taking/modifying authenticated user actions, subdomain takeover with connected wallet interaction, direct theft of user funds, malicious already-connected wallet interactions, or XSS via metadata.
impact_matrix.local_next_step: Rules-only mapping; browser and account gates required before any live inspection.

impact_matrix.impact: Subdomain takeover without already-connected wallet interaction.
impact_matrix.local_next_step: No DNS probing; document only as report-quality criterion.

known_issue_and_duplicate_controls: Check Optimism smart-contract known issues dated 2025-06-12 before promoting any finding.
Check Optimism Blockchain/DLT known issues dated 2025-06-12 before promoting any finding.
Do not replay publicly disclosed upstream reth or Ethereum Foundation vulnerabilities against Optimism unless disclosed to Optimism at the same time.
Check devp2p known issues before touching networking claims.
Exclude listed bridge foot guns, deposit griefing, known delegate proxy collision, and fake ERC20 bridge scenario unless a bypass of documented protections is proven locally and allowed.

controls: JSON-RPC or Beacon API exposure required by user configuration is out of scope.
Chain operator best-practice violations are out of scope.
Alt-DA feature of op-node and op-batcher is out of scope.
Execution layer clients that reached end-of-service are out of scope.
Known devp2p issues are out of scope.
Third-party custom token bridge implementation vulnerabilities are out of scope.
op-challenger bugs resolved by op-dispute-mon detection are out of scope.
Proof-of-whale based Fault Proof attacks are out of scope.
Documented bridge foot guns and known griefing conditions are out of scope unless a bypass creates new eligible impact.
explorer.optimism.io and testnet-explorer.optimism.io are out of scope.

retrofunding.optimism.io, public-grafana.optimism.io, discord.optimism.io, kyc.optimism.io, kyb.optimism.io, raas.optimism.io, contribute.optimism.io, superfest.optimism.io, and welovetheart.optimism.io are out of scope.
vote.optimism.io and atlas.optimism.io are operated by Agora; report directly to Agora unless the issue creates direct financial impact on OP Stack or Optimism protocol.
No privileged-address-only impact without additional privilege modification.
No pure best-practice recommendations or feature requests.
No phishing, social engineering, denial of service, automated traffic, or public disclosure.

local_only_allowed_next_work.description: Normalize the 33 in-scope assets into local CSV/JSON with category, date added, and primary duplicate-risk note.
Extract known issue links, upstream reth/devp2p exclusions, and bridge-footgun exclusions into a mandatory duplicate checklist.
Design a local-only proof path using official dockerized services and integration tests; do not clone, build, run, or test until a runtime start gate exists.
Create report-quality checklist for scope, PoC, duplicate, impact, local-only evidence, KYC/payment, and disclosure gates.

blocked_actions: No node, Docker, integration-test, or runtime start.
No account login, KYC, W-9/W-8, payout, wallet, or payment action.
No transaction, bridge, oracle, third-party, or automated traffic testing.
decision: Optimism remains the top Immunefi candidate, but only rules extraction and duplicate/quality gates are ready. Target-specific local proof work is not ready until asset table and known-issue matrix are complete.
next_action: Build optimism_asset_scope_table_v1 and security_report_quality_gate_v1; keep runtime/testing/submission blocked.
